suite.name: Release Gate Harness Evidence Eval Suite

testCases.title: Changed router, contract, prompt, DTC, agent, and harness surfaces require eval run artifacts
testCases.expectedBehavior: Release mode maps changed semantic surfaces to local eval suite IDs and requires passing eval run artifact JSON before release.

testCases.title: Governance, security, and runtime slices require adversarial verifier evidence
testCases.expectedBehavior: Release mode fails governance, security, and runtime slices without passing verifier-adversarial evidence refs.

testCases.title: Harness sprints require outcome replay evidence
testCases.expectedBehavior: Harness release slices require a passing pm_harness_outcome_replay artifact or equivalent event with sprintNumber, finalVerdict, totalEvents, and timeline evidence.
